creator: aflist2@gmail.com
text:
i've found that only libdvdcss-1.2.9_2 needs to be recompiled with
gcc34, everything else can be made with gcc4.

i can't get vobcopy-1.1.1 to work at all. (new version wants
/etc/mtab, seems to be some linux specific file)

atapci0: <VIA 6420 SATA150 controller> port
0xbc00-0xbc07,0xc000-0xc003,0xc400-0xc407,0xc800-0xc803,0xcc00-0xcc0f,0xd000-0xd0ff
irq 20 at device 15.0 on pci0
atapci1: <VIA 8237 UDMA133 controller> port
0x1f0-0x1f7,0x3f6,0x170-0x177,0x376,0xd400-0xd40f at device 15.1 on
pci0
acd0: DVDR <PIONEER DVD-RW DVR-115D/1.18> at ata0-master UDMA66

i'm able to reproduce this on another system that uses a via 82c686b controller.
